
---
title: "Figure 2 – PD genetic risk association"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(dplyr)

load("results/MAGMA/magma_results.RData")
load("results/GO_PPI/GO_PPI_results.RData")

pA <- Heatmap(magma_celltype_matrix,
              name="-log10(p)",
              column_title="A")
pA

pB <- Heatmap(magma_subtype_matrix,
              name="-log10(p)",
              column_title="B")
pB

pC <- ggplot(go_terms,
             aes(term, logp, size = logp, color = celltype)) +
      geom_point() +
      coord_flip() +
      ggtitle("C")

pC

ggsave("figures/Figure2.pdf",
       pC,
       width=14,
       height=10,
       device="pdf")
